steps.title: Find the matching angle
steps.content:
The $74^\circ$ angle and the adjacent angle on line $q$ form a straight angle.
$$180-74=106$$
Because line $q$ is parallel to line $r$, the corresponding angle labeled $y^\circ$ also measures $106^\circ$.

steps.title: Use the angle equation
steps.content: Substitute $y=106$ into the given equation. $$106=2x+8$$ $$98=2x$$ $$49=x$$ The answer is C.
